title: Tinubu Reviews Economic Outlook as Oil Prices Rise
content: Nigeria’s federal government has begun reviewing its economic projections following rising global oil prices linked to international tensions. Analysts say higher oil revenue could improve fiscal stability.

title: Yobe APC Chairman Re-elected After Party Congress
content: Delegates at the Yobe State APC congress voted overwhelmingly to return the incumbent chairman for another term, pledging unity ahead of upcoming elections.

title: Lagos Begins Smart Traffic Camera Expansion
content: Lagos State authorities have expanded the city’s intelligent traffic camera network to improve road safety and reduce congestion across major highways.

title: Central Bank Reviews Monetary Policy Amid Inflation Concerns
content: The Central Bank of Nigeria is reviewing its monetary policy as inflation pressures remain high. Economists expect new measures to stabilize the naira.

title: Abuja Airport Expansion Project Moves to Final Phase
content: Officials confirmed that expansion work at Abuja’s international airport has entered its final stage, increasing passenger capacity and improving logistics.

title: Federal Government Launches Youth Employment Initiative
content: A new national program aimed at tackling youth unemployment will provide training in digital technology, agriculture, and manufacturing sectors.

title: Nigeria Expands Solar Energy Investment
content: The federal government announced several new solar energy projects designed to increase electricity access in rural communities.

title: Kano Launches New Healthcare Access Program
content: Kano State has introduced a healthcare initiative aimed at improving access to primary health services in underserved communities.

title: Nigeria and ECOWAS Leaders Discuss Regional Security
content: Regional leaders met to discuss security cooperation and strategies to combat terrorism and cross-border crime in West Africa.

title: Kaduna Opens Technology Innovation Hub
content: Kaduna State has launched a new innovation hub to support tech startups and digital entrepreneurs in northern Nigeria.

title: Nigeria Boosts Agricultural Export Strategy
content: Agriculture officials say new export strategies will focus on cocoa, sesame seeds, and cassava to strengthen Nigeria’s foreign earnings.

title: Ogun State Announces Major Road Rehabilitation Plan
content: Ogun State government has unveiled a plan to rehabilitate several key highways linking industrial zones to Lagos.

title: Police Launch Community Safety Initiative
content: Nigeria Police say the new initiative will strengthen partnerships with communities to improve intelligence gathering and crime prevention.

title: Nigeria Signs Trade Cooperation Agreement with West African Partners
content: The new agreement is expected to boost trade flows and infrastructure cooperation across the ECOWAS region.

title: Rivers State Launches Clean Water Campaign
content: Authorities in Rivers State have launched a campaign to expand access to safe drinking water in rural communities.

title: Nigerian Universities Expand Digital Learning Platforms
content: Universities across Nigeria are investing in new digital learning systems to improve online education capabilities.

title: Federal Roads Maintenance Agency Begins Nationwide Repairs
content: Road maintenance teams have begun emergency repairs across major highways to improve safety and transportation efficiency.

title: Nigerian Startup Ecosystem Sees Surge in Investment
content: Technology startups in Lagos and Abuja are attracting new venture capital funding, boosting the country's innovation sector.

title: Education Ministry Announces School Infrastructure Upgrade
content: The education ministry plans to upgrade classrooms, laboratories, and libraries in public schools nationwide.

title: Anti-Corruption Campaign Launched Nationwide
content: Authorities have launched a nationwide campaign encouraging transparency and accountability across government institutions.
